waiting_for: Price to reach EMA75 (~30031) for EMA_BOUNCE long entry

long_assessment.reasoning: Price has pulled back below EMA21 (30079.89) to 30045.75, delivering the deeper pullback we were waiting for. In a strong uptrend (EMA21 > EMA75 > EMA150), the EMA75 at 30031.03 is the next logical support zone — only 14.7 points below current price. Stochastic at 45.18 is neutral with room to turn up, and the 30000 psychological level sits just 31 points below EMA75, adding confluence. A LIMIT order at EMA75 (30031.03) captures the bounce with a 40-point stop (29991.03) below the psych level, yielding a 3.6:1 R/R after the 5-point target buffer. The setup has matured from 'waiting' to 'ready' because the entry level is now clearly defined at EMA75.

short_assessment.reasoning: No bearish structure in place. Nearest bearish FVG is 706 points above at 30680–30756. Price remains in a clear uptrend (EMA21 > EMA75 > EMA150), stochastic is neutral (45.18), and the 30000 psych level below acts as support, not resistance. No valid short setup exists.
